key_findings: Intermediate states cease to be fixed points at lambda>0
D_eff=4 remains constant for all stable fixed points

interpretation.mechanism: Fixed point annihilation via group coupling
interpretation.physical_meaning: Group coupling lambda forces inter-group synchronization
interpretation.transition_type: First-order-like abrupt reduction in attractor count

D_eff_definition.definition: Number of eigenvalues with negative real part in Jacobian
D_eff_definition.note: D_eff measures local stability, not attractor count
